outage_warning: IMBARAGA: Amashanyarazi azima mu gace kawe saa {time} ({prob}). Shaza ibikoresho byawe nonaha.
outage_confirmed: GUCIKAMO AMASHANYARAZI byemejwe mu gace kawe. Byatangajwe n'abatumiwa benshi.
outage_resolved: AMASHANYARAZI AGARUTSE mu gace kawe. Gucikamo byamaze iminota {duration}.
welcome: Murakaza neza kuri Blackout Predictor! Uzahabwa imenyesha igihe gucikamo amashanyarazi guteganijwe mu gace kawe.
test: Ubu ni ubutumwa bw'igerageza buvuye kuri Blackout Predictor. Imenyesha yawe ya SMS ikora neza.
